title: Chthonian TD
description:
Chthonian TDA co-op action roguelite x tower defense game for 1–4 players.

Defend against escalating waves.
Descend into a crystal mine to grow stronger.
Face a powerful enemy that shifts the pace of the run.
If you survive - push into optional Endless Mode.

Short runs. Constant pressure. No autopilot.

You’re Always in the FightNot a passive tower defense. Expect to stay active and make decisions under pressure from the start.

You move, aim, dodge, revive teammates and react under pressure while your defenses buy you time.

Towers strengthen your defense - player decisions still drive the run.

Every Run EvolvesLevel-ups offer upgrade cards that reshape your build.

Some make you safer.
Some reward greed.
Some push the run toward instability.

Your build changes how the game feels.
No two runs play the same.

Power Has a PriceStay above and hold the line.

Or descend into the mine to accelerate your growth.

Mining fuels stronger builds - but leaving at the wrong time can cost the run.

Greed is always a decision.

Four Roles. One Team.Fighter - controls space and absorbs pressure
Miner - accelerates economy and scaling
Engineer - stabilizes lanes and strengthens defenses
Medic - prevents collapse when mistakes happen

XP is shared. Builds diverge. Survival is collective.

New Depths AwaitThe Abandoned Mine is only the beginning.

Survive runs to unlock new regions:

• Forgotten Ruins

• Frozen Caverns

• Molten Depths

Each descent brings new enemies, new pressure, and a different battlefield.

Early Access Features• 1–4 player online co-op

• ~15 minute structured runs

• Two map styles with distinct pacing

• Four regions to fight through

• A powerful mid-run enemy encounter

• Optional Endless Mode

• Card-based progression each run

• Persistent upgrades between runs

• No friendly fire

VisionChthonian TD is built around one idea:

Relentless action, meaningful choices, and co-op that actually demands teamwork.

Fight above. Mine below. Survive together.
description_short: Fast-paced co-op action roguelite × tower defense. Fight escalating waves, risk resources in a dangerous mine, defeat the boss - then see how long you survive in Endless.
